name: Academics
description: Oversees the study and teaching of all subjects.

name: Science
description: Oversees the study and teaching of natural and physical sciences such as biology, chemistry, and physics.

name: Mathematics
description: Responsible for mathematics education, curriculum design, and support for analytical learning.

name: English
description: Handles courses related to English language, literature, and effective communication skills.

name: Social Studies
description: Focuses on history, geography, civics, and social sciences to promote civic understanding.

name: ICT
description: Manages information technology instruction, infrastructure, and digital literacy programs.

name: Business
description: Covers accounting, management, economics, and entrepreneurship-related courses.

name: Arts
description: Encourages creativity through visual arts, music, drama, and cultural education.

name: Physical Education
description: Promotes fitness, sportsmanship, and physical wellness among students.

name: Guidance & Counseling
description: Provides emotional, academic, and career counseling to support student development.

name: Health
description: Coordinates school health programs, first aid, and overall student wellbeing.

name: Administration
description: Manages school operations, human resources, and general administrative support.

name: Finance
description: Oversees accounting, budgeting, and financial reporting for the school.

name: Maintenance
description: Responsible for campus maintenance, repairs, and facility management.

name: Security
description: Ensures the safety and protection of students, staff, and school property.

name: Library & Media
description: Manages library operations and promotes academic research and resource access.

name: Transportation
description: Manages transportation services for students and staff.
